content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — Paywall offers a quid-pro-quo review incentive: "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" (App/PaywallView.swift:11).
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering compensation or rewards in exchange for ratings, as it corrupts App Store review integrity (guideline 2.3.9, plus 5.6.4 rating manipulation). The paywall footnote promises free Premium time for a 5-star review, which reviewers frequently catch during purchase-flow testing. Remove the incentive copy and, if you want ratings, use the standard SKStoreReviewController/requestReview prompt without any reward attached.
